THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 998 OFFER AND ACCEPTANCE ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRAY, IAN GRAY, REGINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAVANAUGH, NEAL R. $3,460.00 PRINCIPAL, $296.22 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,756.22, PURSUANT TO CCP 998: PLAINTIFF IAN GRAY TO HAVE $3310, AND REGINA GRAY $150, FROM DEFENDANT.

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-02-1995, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUN-02-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-07-1995 CONTINUED FROM JUN-02-1995 TO JUL-07-1995 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
CASE REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION JUDGMENT OR DISMISSAL AS TO ALL PARTIES
